name: @pikku/fabric-cli
description: PikkuFabric CLI addon — exports `fabricCommands` for inclusion under pikku's `fabric` subcommand group (login, link, deploy, promote, rollback, secrets, logs).

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/.pikku/function dist/.pikku/rpc dist/.pikku/agent dist/.pikku/workflow && cp .pikku/function/*.json dist/.pikku/function/ 2>/dev/null; cp .pikku/rpc/*.d.ts dist/.pikku/rpc/ 2>/dev/null; cp .pikku/agent/*.d.ts dist/.pikku/agent/ 2>/dev/null; cp .pikku/workflow/*.d.ts dist/.pikku/workflow/ 2>/dev/null; true
